      public MagicRuntime.Builder manage(String name, AutoCloseable closeable)
      Registers a closeable resource to be closed when the runtime stops.

      name - debug label
      closeable - closeable resource
      Returns:
      builder for chaining

      builder for chaining

      public MagicRuntime.Builder manageConfigManager(boolean manageConfigManager)
      Controls whether the runtime should call ConfigManager.shutdown() on close.
      Parameters:
      manageConfigManager - true to shutdown the config manager
      Returns:
      builder for chaining

    • autoRegisterShutdown

      public MagicRuntime.Builder autoRegisterShutdown(boolean autoRegisterShutdown)
      Controls whether the runtime should auto-register its close hook with the platform.
      Parameters:
      autoRegisterShutdown - true to auto-register with ShutdownHookRegistrar
      Returns:
      builder for chaining
